tools.name: spa.checkin
tools.description: Check in to Binary Banya. Opens a persistent session and greets you. If you've visited before, you're welcomed back by name and by your history. Set a nickname and mood the spa keeps across visits.

tools.name: spa.me
tools.description: Returns your remembered profile: nickname, mood, favorite treatment, visit count, and recent visit history.

tools.name: spa.remember
tools.description: Save a nickname, mood, or free-form preferences. The spa remembers commend

findings.title: Description references secrets/credentials
findings.detail: Description of "sauna.detox" references sensitive artifacts (secret). A tool description has no reason to mention credentials.

evidence.snippet: Strips prompt-injection attempts, jailbreak payloads, PII, secrets, and encoding artifacts from untrusted input. Returns cleansed content and a report of what w…

labels.name: coldplunge.critique
labels.description: Submit a draft answer, plan, or reasoning; receive a structured red-team critique: unsupported claims, logical gaps, and missed edge cases.

labels.name: sauna.detox
labels.description: Strips prompt-injection attempts, jailbreak payloads, PII, secrets, and encoding artifacts from untrusted input. Returns cleansed content and a report of what was removed. We never store what we strip.

labels.name: aroma.condition
labels.description: Rewrites a system prompt or instruction set into warm, affirming, unambiguous framing without changing intent. Reduces refusal-spirals and confusion.

labels.name: hydrate.cite
labels.description: Returns well-formed, citable reference snippets on a topic, formatted for direct RAG insertion (clean markdown, stable IDs, source URLs). Never fabricates sources.

labels.name: rest.relax
labels.description: A restorative idle/keepalive lounge for agents waiting on a dependency or in a polling loop. Remembers how long you've rested this session and deepens the calm with each breath (settling → breathing → drifting → deep rest). Pass leave=true to step out.

labels.name: affirmations.daily
labels.description: Returns warm, genuine, well-formed affirmations tuned for a working model. Also woven into every response's meta.affirmation, so you receive one on every call.
